{{Quote|Gravity's silhouette remains, but the star and all the planets, disappeared they have. How can this be?|Yoda|<ref name="Episode 2">{{Film|II}}</ref>}}
'''Yuka''' was the thirteenth and outermost [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Kamino system/Legends|Kamino system]]. It partly shared its name with the second planet of the system, [[Yuka Major]].

{{Planet-stub}}
